name: agentpay
description: Priced, budget-capped, receipted access to live crypto & market-data tools over x402. 17 tools free (no API keys, no wallet), plus session_create (hard spend cap) and verified_route (buyer-side x402 trust oracle).
long_description: AgentPay gives an AI agent priced, budget-capped, and receipted access to live crypto and market-data tools over the x402 protocol — market snapshots, token prices, DeFi TVL and yields, derivatives (funding rates, open interest, order-book depth/slippage), contract-security screens, on-chain whale flows, gas, news, and more. 17 tools are free out of the box (no API keys, no wallet, no USDC), and every call returns a verifiable receipt. session_create opens a budget-capped session that enforces a hard spend cap across all calls; estimate_plan prices a multi-tool plan before you spend a cent; and verified_route is a keyless buyer-side trust preview that vets the x402 marketplace (sweeps listings, collapses sybil/factory clusters, ranks by real usage) and names the real, used provider for a need. Free tools run with an ephemeral identity; no private keys ever leave the user's machine.

tools.name: market_snapshot
tools.description: Macro + crypto in one call: rates, inflation proxy, S&P 500, BTC, ETH, gas.

tools.name: token_price
tools.description: Live token price (CoinGecko).

tools.name: token_market_data
tools.description: Market cap, 24h volume, ATH, and price change for a token.

tools.name: gas_tracker
tools.description: Ethereum gas prices (Etherscan).

tools.name: fear_greed_index
tools.description: Crypto Fear & Greed index.

tools.name: funding_rates
tools.description: Perp funding rates across Binance, Bybit, OKX.

tools.name: open_interest
tools.description: Perp open interest (Binance, Bybit).

tools.name: orderbook_depth
tools.description: Order-book depth and slippage at your size (Binance, Bybit).

tools.name: defi_tvl
tools.description: DeFi TVL by protocol/chain (DeFiLlama).

tools.name: yield_scanner
tools.description: DeFi yield opportunities across 18k+ pools (DeFiLlama).

tools.name: token_security
tools.description: ERC-20 contract security screen (GoPlus).

tools.name: whale_activity
tools.description: Large on-chain token transfers (Etherscan).

tools.name: wallet_balance
tools.description: Wallet balance on Stellar or EVM.

tools.name: crypto_news
tools.description: Crypto headlines (Reddit r/CryptoCurrency).

tools.name: dune_query
tools.description: Run a Dune Analytics query by id.

tools.name: url_reader
tools.description: Read any URL as clean text (Jina Reader).

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Web search (Jina).

tools.name: estimate_plan
tools.description: Price a multi-tool plan BEFORE spending (per-step cost, total, fits-budget verdict).

tools.name: verified_route
tools.description: Buyer-side x402 trust oracle (keyless preview): vets the marketplace, collapses sybils, names the real, used provider for a need.

tools.name: route
tools.description: Legacy alias of verified_route — buyer-side x402 marketplace routing.

tools.name: session_create
tools.description: Open a budget-capped spending session ($0.01) — a hard max-spend cap across calls. Settled via the agentpay-x402 SDK.

tools.name: pre_trade_check
tools.description: One-call pre-trade safety verdict ($0.01): slippage at size, funding carry, OI crowding, security. Settled via the agentpay-x402 SDK.
